arts.ttl: Milan Facing Risk of Racking Up Negative Records
arts.sum: Milan fell to Atalanta in the last matchday after two encouraging results since switching from 4-2-3-1 to 3-4-3. They have collected just 51 points after 33 games, which is their worst clip in 10 years. The Rossoneri had done worse only in 2014/2015. The post Milan Facing Risk of Racking Up Negative Records appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.
